zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Williamson於1455年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，他的父親Sir John Henry Williamson25歲，母親Lady Anne Haddle20歲。他於1468年與Alice Zimmerman在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾吉爾斯比結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1503年5月22日在英國林可爾史爾文比享年48歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾阿福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Williamson于1455年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，他的父亲Sir John Henry Williamson25岁，母亲Lady Anne Haddle20岁。他于1468年与Alice Zimmerman在英国英格兰林可爾史爾吉爾斯比结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1503年5月22日在英国林可爾史爾文比享年48岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾阿福德。

nameMeanings.name: Williamson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northern) and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name William + patronymic -son ‘son of William’. This surname is also found in Northern Ireland (Ulster), especially in Antrim.
Americanized form of Norwegian, Danish, and North German Wilhelmsen , Swedish Wilhelmsson, or Dutch and North German Willemsen , all cognates of 1.

History: This surname was brought to North America from northern England and northern Ireland independently by numerous different bearers from the 17th century onward. Timothy Williamson is recorded in Plymouth Colony in 1643.

variants.name: Willamson
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Williamson  .

variants.name: William
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name William, Willam, Willem, an Old Picard and Norman French form of ancient Germanic Willihelm, composed of the elements wil- ‘will, desire’ + helm- ‘helmet, protection’. This Norman personal name became widely used in England, Scotland and Wales after the Conquest, mainly no doubt in honor of the Conqueror himself. By the 13th century it had already become the most popular personal name in England. A Parisian form of the name Guillaume was also sometimes used (see Gillam ), which in medieval Wales was adopted as Gwilym (see Gwilliam ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Guillaume  .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Williamson was born in 1455, in Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir John Henry Williamson, was 25 and his mother, Lady Anne Haddle, was 20. He married Alice Zimmerman in 1468, in Girsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 22 May 1503, in Winceby, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Alford, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Williamson est né en 1455, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Henry Williamson, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Haddle, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Alice Zimmerman en 1468, à Girsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 mai 1503, à Winceby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Alford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Williamson 1455 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Henry Williamson 25 und seine Mutter Lady Anne Haddle 20. Er hat 1468 in Girsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Zimmerman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. Mai 1503 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Winceby, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Alford, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Williamson è nato il nel 1455 nel Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Henry Williamson, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Lady Anne Haddle, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Alice Zimmerman nel 1468, nel Girsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 maggio 1503, nel Winceby, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Alford, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Williamsonが1455年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Henry Williamsonは25歳，母Lady Anne Haddleは20歳であった。1468年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアギルスビーでAlice Zimmermanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1503年5月22日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウィンセビーで48歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアアルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Williamson(이)가 1455년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Henry Williamson(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Anne Haddle(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1468년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 지르스비에서 Alice Zimmerman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1503년 5월 22일 영국 링코실르 윈스비에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 알퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Williamson nasceu em 1455, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Henry Williamson, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Haddle, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Zimmerman em 1468, em Girsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de maio de 1503, em Winceby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Alford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Williamson родился в 1455 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Henry Williamson было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Haddle, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Zimmerman в 1468 г. в местности гирсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 22 мая 1503 г. в местности винцеби, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности алфорд, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Williamson nació en 1455, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Henry Williamson, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Anne Haddle, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Alice Zimmerman en 1468, en Girsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de mayo de 1503, en Winceby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Alford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
